mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sensor_frame ( panel_id, mode, volt_v, leak_ma, temperature, humidity, fire_raw, gas_raw, error_bits, door_status, total_current, total_power ) VALUES ( #{panelId}, #{mode}, #{voltV}, #{leakMa}, #{temperature}, #{humidity}, #{fireRaw}, #{gasRaw}, #{errorBits}, #{doorStatus}, #{totalCurrent}, #{totalPower} )
